support.why_not_vp: No CEO-only lever present: no blocked discount, no roadmap commit required, no exec-to-exec bridge requested. The gap (no Economic Buyer mapped on a $120K deal, plus an overdue demo) is standard CRO/SE execution - Rick can drive the CPO intro and resource the demo without CEO involvement, and no buyer EB has even been named to connect to.

monitor.reason: Buyer keeps chasing action items WE owe as the July 15 shortlist looms, and the deal was just cut ~40%.

triggers.summary: Overdue Merlin AI-redlining demo - our wedge vs Agiloft - still undelivered days before July 15 shortlist
triggers.detail: Karishma (legal) asked for a LIVE Merlin AI redlining / clause-extraction demo on Jun 16; it is the explicit activation move to beat primary rival Agiloft, yet it is still undelivered while the buyer keeps chasing us on the open 'Demo Follow-Up and Requested Action Points' thread (last inbound Jul 1). On Jun 30 Gajendra added a fresh ask - put iContract license and implementation pricing into the proposal. With the champion's shortlist locked for July 15 (12 days out) and no Economic Buyer engaged, every day we sit on our own deliverables risks Zycus being shortlisted only for P2P while Agiloft takes the CLM scope - fragmenting the $120K.
triggers.metric: Redlining demo 17 days overdue (due Jun 17); shortlist decision July 15 = 12 days out
triggers.ceo_ask: Ask Rick why the live Merlin redlining demo Karishma requested Jun 16 is still not delivered 12 days before the July 15 shortlist, and whether an SE is booked to show it live this week.
triggers.evidence: recent_activities email 'Source-to-Pay RFP: Demo Follow-Up and Requested Action Points # Zycus' inbound 2026-07-01; Next_Step 2026-06-30 'Gajendra requested Zycus add item to Proposal - iContract license pricing, implementation pricing'; our_open_deliverables 'Deliver live working version of AI redlining assistance to Karishma (legal)' due 2026-06-17 status overdue
